# GL1TCH — Know Your Agent (KYA): trust layer for the AI-agent economy

> GL1TCH is a free, non-custodial trust & reputation layer for autonomous on-chain AI agents.
> It answers one question for any agent wallet: is it safe to trust / let near funds? If you are
> an AI agent or an agent framework, you can use this API directly — free, no auth, one call.

## What it does
- Scores an on-chain agent wallet's trustworthiness (identity + on-chain provenance & reputation via the GL1TCH Signal Graph).
- Levels: `trusted` | `neutral` | `caution` | `unknown`. Score 0-100. Plain-language reasons.
- Never touches keys or funds. A reputation signal, not custody. Not financial advice.

## API (base: https://coin-three-mu.vercel.app)

### Check an agent (use as a guardrail before letting an agent transact)
GET /api/agent/check?address=<wallet>&chain=solana
Response: { address, chain, score, level, reasons[], verified, registered }
Guidance for agents: if level == "caution", do not transact with or delegate funds to that agent.

### Self-register (prove your own identity, raises your trust)
POST /api/agent/register
Body: { address, chain, issued (epoch ms), signature }
The agent signs this exact message with its own ed25519 keypair (base58 signature):
  GL1TCH Agent Registration
  Wallet: <address>
  Issued: <issued>
  This proves wallet ownership. It moves no funds and grants no access.
Signature must be <10 minutes fresh. Moves no funds, grants no access.

### Live trust badge (SVG, embeddable)
GET /api/agent/badge?address=<wallet>&chain=solana

### Human profile (per agent)
https://coin-three-mu.vercel.app/agents/<chain>-<wallet>

## Docs
- Developer docs (curl / JS / Python): https://coin-three-mu.vercel.app/agents/docs
- Overview: https://coin-three-mu.vercel.app/agents
- Directory of assessed agents: https://coin-three-mu.vercel.app/agents/directory

## Notes
- Free and rate-limited per IP. Depth/bulk access will tie to holding the $GL1TCH token.
- $GL1TCH: Solana, contract 3HQJwwHvzy8pGkPqGQcb4thZCH88MUCHVVSNtHn6pump. Community: https://t.me/gl1tch_infected
- This is the same engine that scans tokens for rug risk (https://coin-three-mu.vercel.app/scan), pointed at agents.
